landing.heroDesc: Upload a video or paste a YouTube URL. ClipForge transcribes, detects viral hooks, crops for vertical, adds captions, and generates platform-ready clips — in minutes.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Three steps. Zero editing skills required.
landing.step1Desc: Drop a video file or paste any YouTube link
landing.step2Desc: Transcription, highlight detection, cropping, subtitles — all automated
landing.step3Desc: Trim, preview, and download your viral-ready short-form clips
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to go viral
landing.featuresDesc: A complete pipeline from raw footage to platform-ready shorts
landing.feat1Desc: Gemini 2.5 Flash analyzes your transcript and finds the most viral-worthy moments with hook scoring
landing.feat2Desc: Face and speaker tracking ensures the subject stays centered in 9:16 format
landing.feat3Desc: Whisper transcription with multiple caption styles burned directly into your clips
landing.feat4Desc: Auto-generated descriptions and hashtags optimized for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube
landing.feat5Desc: Custom colors, fonts, subtitle styles and watermarks applied consistently across all clips
landing.feat6Desc: Process up to 20 YouTube URLs at once — perfect for repurposing entire playlists
landing.trustGdprDesc: Full data export, account deletion, and privacy controls built in
landing.trustFastDesc: Most videos processed in under 5 minutes with priority queue for paid plans
landing.trustViralDesc: AI-scored clips ranked by viral potential so you post the best content first
landing.finalCtaDesc: Join creators who save hours every week repurposing long-form content into short-form clips that drive engagement.
landing.finalCtaNote: 100 free credits. No credit card required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountDesc: Manage your profile, change password, and update notification preferences.
settings.dataPrivacyDesc: Under GDPR, you have the right to export or delete all your personal data.
settings.deleteConfirm1: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account and all data? This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm2: This will permanently delete all your clips, jobs, brand kit, and account. Type OK to confirm.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.desc: Start free with 100 credits. Scale as you grow — no hidden fees, no contracts.

faqs.a: Each minute of source video processed uses 1 credit. A 10-minute YouTube video uses 10 credits, regardless of how many clips are generated.
Yes. Cancel from your dashboard — no penalties, no hidden fees. Your credits remain active until the end of your billing period.
Monthly credits reset each billing cycle. Need more? Purchase one-time credit packs that never expire.
YouTube URLs and direct file uploads (MP4, MOV, WEBM). We support videos up to 4 hours long.
Most videos are processed in 2-5 minutes. Pro and Agency plans get priority queue access for faster turnaround.
All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest. We are GDPR compliant and you can export or delete your data at any time.
